tweets.text:
n8n just crossed 191K GitHub stars and it's not slowing down.

Most people still think of n8n as "Zapier but self-hosted." That's underselling what it's become.

The real story: n8n is now a full AI workflow platform with 400+ integrations, native MCP client and server support,
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
OpenRouter just shipped Fusion — and it changes how you should think about model routing.

Fusion isn't a single model. It's a multi-model deliberation system. You call one endpoint, and behind the scenes a panel of expert models analyzes your prompt in parallel, then a judge
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:

tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
AppFlowy just hit 71 K stars on GitHub - a figure that says more than hype; it's a clear signal.

Built entirely with Flutter, it's the first serious open-source challenger to Notion. It offers AI-powered blocks, self-hosting, and a fully collaborative workspace. With AppFlowy,
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:
Claude Opus 4.8 just landed—and it's not a flashy, new‑fangled model. It's a surgical upgrade aimed at developers who actually ship code.

Same price tag, but a noticeable jump in agentic performance. The stat that caught my eye? It's four times less likely to miss a code flaw
tweets.name: Teksart

tweets.text:

tweets.text:
LobeHub just crossed 78K stars on GitHub — and it's one of the most ambitious agent orchestration platforms out there.

tweets.text:
